## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Documentation

## Local checks

- [ ] I ran `npm run format:check`
- [ ] I ran `npm run lint`
- [ ] I ran `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] I ran `npm run test`
- [ ] I ran `npm run build`

## Environment impact

- [ ] No environment variable changes
- [ ] Added/changed frontend env variables
- [ ] Added/changed backend env variables
- [ ] Updated `.env.example` files
- [ ] Updated `.env.test.example` if tests need new variables
- [ ] Updated local `.env.test` if needed
- [ ] Updated GitHub Actions env values if CI needs them

## Auth0 impact

- [ ] No Auth0 changes
- [ ] Changed Auth0 Application settings
- [ ] Changed Auth0 API audience/settings
- [ ] Updated callback/logout/web origin URLs
- [ ] Updated frontend Auth0 env values
- [ ] Updated backend Auth0 env values

## Testing notes

Explain how this was tested.
